goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'worth house'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '8 people' and '3 nights' starting from 'thursday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 10:45' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
The train should leave on 'sunday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called worth house
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 8 people and 3 nights starting from thursday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 10:45 and should go to bishops stortford
The train should leave on sunday and should depart from cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
